death_upright.title: Death
death_upright.meaning: A major phase of your life is ending to make way for something far greater. Embrace the change instead of fighting it.

death_reversed.title: Death
death_reversed.meaning: You are resisting a necessary transformation or clinging to a dead situation. Let go so the rebirth can begin.

fool_upright.title: The Fool
fool_upright.meaning: Leap into the unknown with pure trust. This is a time for fresh journeys, optimism, and unburdened potential.

fool_reversed.title: The Fool
fool_reversed.meaning: You may be acting recklessly without considering the consequences, or fear is keeping you from taking a necessary leap.

magician_upright.title: The Magician
magician_upright.meaning: You possess all the tools and talents required to manifest your desires. Align your willpower to make things happen.

magician_reversed.title: The Magician
magician_reversed.meaning: Be careful of deceptive influences, or recognize where you are misusing your intelligence and wasting your true potential.

judgement_upright.title: Judgement
judgement_upright.meaning: A period of self-evaluation brings an ideological awakening. Trust your past lessons to make an important crossroad decision.

judgement_reversed.title: Judgement
judgement_reversed.meaning: Loud self-doubt and your harsh inner critic are paralyzing you. Stop judging yourself over past missteps.

moon_upright.title: The Moon
moon_upright.meaning: Things are not entirely as they seem on the surface. Trust your gut instincts to safely navigate through the illusions and hidden anxieties.

moon_reversed.title: The Moon
moon_reversed.meaning: The fog is finally lifting. Secrets are being brought to light, and subconscious anxieties are losing their grip on you.

world_upright.title: The World
world_upright.meaning: A major cycle is successfully complete. Celebrate your achievements and enjoy the deep sense of wholeness and unity.

world_reversed.title: The World
world_reversed.meaning: You are struggling to find closure or trying to take shortcuts. Tie up loose ends to properly finish this life chapter.

hierophant_upright.title: The Hierophant
hierophant_upright.meaning: Seek structure, traditional knowledge, or guidance from a trusted mentor. Aligning with established beliefs offers comfort right now.

hierophant_reversed.title: The Hierophant
hierophant_reversed.meaning: It is time to break free from outdated dogmas and create your own rules. Challenge societal expectations and follow your unorthodox path.

wheel-of-fortune_upright.title: The Wheel of Fortune
wheel-of-fortune_upright.meaning: The cosmic wheel spins in your favor. Expect sudden lucky breakthroughs, favorable synchronicities, and fated changes.

wheel-of-fortune_reversed.title: The Wheel of Fortune
wheel-of-fortune_reversed.meaning: You are experiencing temporary setbacks or bad luck. Recognize negative cycles and actively break them rather than resisting the shift.

empress_upright.title: The Empress
empress_upright.meaning: Connect deeply with your senses, unleash your creativity, and nurture your surroundings. Abundance is flowing around you.

empress_reversed.title: The Empress
empress_reversed.meaning: You might be smothering others with codependency, or suffering from a severe creative block. Reclaim your independent spark.

emperor_upright.title: The Emperor
emperor_upright.meaning: Bring discipline, rigid structure, and protective logic into your life. Stand tall in your personal power and command authority.

emperor_reversed.title: The Emperor
emperor_reversed.meaning: Someone nearby is acting like an absolute tyrant, or your own self-imposed rules have become way too cold and rigid.

lovers_upright.title: The Lovers
lovers_upright.meaning: Deep harmony, choices, and shared core values are emphasized. This marks beautiful communication and balanced connections.

lovers_reversed.title: The Lovers
lovers_reversed.meaning: Asymmetric values or hidden conflicts are threatening a relationship. Realign your personal integrity before making a choice.

hanged-man_upright.title: The Hanged Man
hanged-man_upright.meaning: Intentionally pause your actions. Surrender to the present delay and view your issues from an entirely inverted perspective.

hanged-man_reversed.title: The Hanged Man
hanged-man_reversed.meaning: You are stubbornly stalling or sacrificing your time for things that simply do not matter. Stop fighting the natural flow.

chariot_upright.title: The Chariot
chariot_upright.meaning: Stay focused, harness your opposing forces, and charge forward. Pure determination will guarantee absolute victory.

chariot_reversed.title: The Chariot
chariot_reversed.meaning: You are burning out due to a complete lack of direction, or aggressive impulses are running your ship completely off course.

devil_upright.title: The Devil
devil_upright.meaning: Unhealthy attachments, material dependencies, or self-sabotaging thoughts are trapping you. Examine your shadows.

devil_reversed.title: The Devil
devil_reversed.meaning: You are severing toxic chains, shedding bad habits, and reclaiming ultimate autonomy over your life.

hermit_upright.title: The Hermit
hermit_upright.meaning: Withdraw temporarily from the external noise. Look inward for answers—the truth can only be found in quiet contemplation.

hermit_reversed.title: The Hermit
hermit_reversed.meaning: Your healthy reflection has curdled into toxic isolation and paranoia. Reconnect with society before you lose perspective.

high-priestess_upright.title: The High Priestess
high-priestess_upright.meaning: Look past the surface world. Dive into your dreams, trust your psychic flashes, and let secrets reveal themselves to you naturally.

high-priestess_reversed.title: The High Priestess
high-priestess_reversed.meaning: You are drowning out your quiet inner voice with logic, or ignoring glaring warning signs about someone's secret motives.

justice_upright.title: Justice
justice_upright.meaning: Absolute truth and balanced fairness prevail. Your current situation will be decided equitably based on pure karmic cause and effect.

justice_reversed.title: Justice
justice_reversed.meaning: You are dealing with unfair biases or refusing to take accountability for your own actions. Face reality cleanly.

star_upright.title: The Star
star_upright.meaning: Peace and quiet renewal are returning to your life. The universe is blessing you with divine inspiration and enduring hope.

star_reversed.title: The Star
star_reversed.meaning: A heavy cloud of discouragement is dimming your inner light. Reconnect to a higher sense of faith; this darkness is only temporary.

strength_upright.title: Strength
strength_upright.meaning: True power lies in quiet stamina, patience, and soft compassion, not brute physical force. Quietly tame your inner beasts.

strength_reversed.title: Strength
strength_reversed.meaning: Insecurity and raw emotional outbursts are draining your energy. Remember your inner core to steady your shaky foundations.

sun_upright.title: The Sun
sun_upright.meaning: Radiant positivity, joy, and physical vitality surround you. Everything you touch right now is illuminated with pristine success.

sun_reversed.title: The Sun
sun_reversed.meaning: The skies are mostly clear, but minor blockages or ungrounded optimism are obscuring your joy. Reconnect with your simple inner child.

temperance_upright.title: Temperance
temperance_upright.meaning: Practice calm moderation and intentional patience. Synthesize conflicting elements into a beautifully balanced, healing mixture.

temperance_reversed.title: Temperance
temperance_reversed.meaning: Extreme overindulgence or clashing priorities are fracturing your peace. Re-center your daily habits immediately.

tower_upright.title: The Tower
tower_upright.meaning: An absolute flash of lightning is breaking down a fragile structure built on illusions. Out of the chaos comes profound revelation.

tower_reversed.title: The Tower
tower_reversed.meaning: You are anxiously trying to prop up a structurally doomed situation. Let it crash so you can clean the bedrock.

aceOfCups_upright.title: Ace of Cups
aceOfCups_upright.meaning: An overwhelming wave of pure emotional fulfillment, fresh love, or creative intuition is bubbling over the rim of your consciousness.

aceOfCups_reversed.title: Ace of Cups
aceOfCups_reversed.meaning: Your emotional reservoir has run dry, or you are severely repressing your true feelings. Turn inward to refill your cup.

2OfCups_upright.title: Two of Cups
2OfCups_upright.meaning: A beautiful soul-level partnership or mutual agreement is forming. Two distinct paths fuse into complete emotional harmony.

2OfCups_reversed.title: Two of Cups
2OfCups_reversed.meaning: A key relationship is suffering from major miscommunications or emotional asymmetry. Re-evaluate your relational bonds.

3OfCups_upright.title: Three of Cups
3OfCups_upright.meaning: Gather with your trusted community, laugh loudly, and celebrate a creative victory. Joy thrives in supportive networks.

3OfCups_reversed.title: Three of Cups
3OfCups_reversed.meaning: Overindulgent partying is distracting you, or toxic social circles are targeting your peace with unnecessary drama and gossip.

4OfCups_upright.title: Four of Cups
4OfCups_upright.meaning: You are feeling thoroughly uninspired, bored, and dismissive. Look up—the universe is offering a gift you are completely ignoring.

4OfCups_reversed.title: Four of Cups
4OfCups_reversed.meaning: You are finally shaking off your mental fog. You are ready to open your eyes, accept new invites, and rejoin the world.

5OfCups_upright.title: Five of Cups
5OfCups_upright.meaning: Do not fixate entirely on the spilled cups behind you. Mourn your loss, but turn around to notice the full cups still standing.

5OfCups_reversed.title: Five of Cups
5OfCups_reversed.meaning: The intense grieving period is concluding. You are finding the strength to pick up your remaining assets and move on with hope.

6OfCups_upright.title: Six of Cups
6OfCups_upright.meaning: A comforting wave of childhood memories or an old friend returns. Bask in pure innocence and simple, past joys.

6OfCups_reversed.title: Six of Cups
6OfCups_reversed.meaning: You are viewing the past through rose-tinted glasses, preventing you from living today. It is time to maturely step forward.

7OfCups_upright.title: Seven of Cups
7OfCups_upright.meaning: Too many tempting options are confusing you. Most of these shimmering clouds are pure fantasy; pick based on cold reality.

7OfCups_reversed.title: Seven of Cups
7OfCups_reversed.meaning: The dizzying choice paralysis is vanishing. You are breaking past the glamorous illusions and selecting your real path with absolute clarity.

8OfCups_upright.title: Eight of Cups
8OfCups_upright.meaning: Though it hurts to leave what you spent so much time building, it no longer feeds your soul. Turn your back and climb higher.

8OfCups_reversed.title: Eight of Cups
8OfCups_reversed.meaning: You are clinging to an unfulfilling arrangement out of raw fear of the unknown. Stop settling for crumbs.

9OfCups_upright.title: Nine of Cups
9OfCups_upright.meaning: This is the 'Wish Card.' Enjoy deep physical satisfaction, material comfort, and the profound realization of a long-held dream.

9OfCups_reversed.title: Nine of Cups
9OfCups_reversed.meaning: You got exactly what you wanted, but it feels surprisingly hollow inside. Check if you sacrificed your morals for vanity.

10OfCups_upright.title: Ten of Cups
10OfCups_upright.meaning: An absolute picture-perfect alignment of domestic bliss, loving family support, and radiant emotional completion surrounds your life.

10OfCups_reversed.title: Ten of Cups
10OfCups_reversed.meaning: Underlying arguments or misaligned ideals are disrupting your household harmony. Fix the foundation with open conversation.

pageOfCups_upright.title: Page of Cups
pageOfCups_upright.meaning: An unexpected, sweet message or a surge of artistic inspiration is arriving. Keep an open, childlike heart to receive it.

pageOfCups_reversed.title: Page of Cups
pageOfCups_reversed.meaning: Emotional tantrums, creative blocks, or toxic escapism are dragging you down. Face reality instead of fleeing into daydreaming fantasies.

knightOfCups_upright.title: Knight of Cups
knightOfCups_upright.meaning: A charming, poetic offer or romantic invitation is riding into your life. Follow your artistic heart with passion.

knightOfCups_reversed.title: Knight of Cups
knightOfCups_reversed.meaning: Someone is using deceptive charm or moodiness to manipulate you. Do not let romantic daydreams blind you to logic.

queenOfCups_upright.title: Queen of Cups
queenOfCups_upright.meaning: Embody deep emotional maturity, infinite empathy, and healing energy. Hold a peaceful space for yourself and others.

queenOfCups_reversed.title: Queen of Cups
queenOfCups_reversed.meaning: You are completely draining your emotional batteries playing the martyr for others, or hiding deep, insecure jealousy inside.

kingOfCups_upright.title: King of Cups
kingOfCups_upright.meaning: Balance your analytical mind with profound emotional intelligence. Navigate difficult challenges with calm diplomacy and wisdom.

kingOfCups_reversed.title: King of Cups
kingOfCups_reversed.meaning: Beware of an emotionally vindictive person playing passive-aggressive mind games, or notice where your own mood swings are harming others.

aceOfPentacles_upright.title: Ace of Pentacles
aceOfPentacles_upright.meaning: A golden seed of tangible wealth, career progression, or a solid new business opportunity is landing directly in your hands.

aceOfPentacles_reversed.title: Ace of Pentacles
aceOfPentacles_reversed.meaning: A financial venture is stalling due to poor planning or shaky foundations. Reconsider an investment before committing cash.

2OfPentacles_upright.title: Two of Pentacles
2OfPentacles_upright.meaning: You are dynamically balancing multi-tasking demands. Stay agile and fluid to ride the waves of busy daily change.

2OfPentacles_reversed.title: Two of Pentacles
2OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: You are trying to juggle way too many balls at once. Drop a secondary project before everything crashes in disorganization.

3OfPentacles_upright.title: Three of Pentacles
3OfPentacles_upright.meaning: Beautiful collaborative effort, architectural building, and shared skills yield high results. Great minds are working in unison.

3OfPentacles_reversed.title: Three of Pentacles
3OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Petty office politics, massive ego clashes, or a severe lack of baseline teamwork are ruining the current project.

4OfPentacles_upright.title: Four of Pentacles
4OfPentacles_upright.meaning: You have built excellent financial stability, but ensure your extreme frugality isn't manifesting as an anxious scarcity mindset.

4OfPentacles_reversed.title: Four of Pentacles
4OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: You are desperately hoarding your resources out of panic. Open your clenched hands and let life circulate naturally.

5OfPentacles_upright.title: Five of Pentacles
5OfPentacles_upright.meaning: Hard times or financial stresses are causing temporary panic. Look closer—the church windows are glowing, and help is available near you.

5OfPentacles_reversed.title: Five of Pentacles
5OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: The grueling financial winter is coming to a close. Debts are being resolved, and physical recovery is well underway.

6OfPentacles_upright.title: Six of Pentacles
6OfPentacles_upright.meaning: Wealth is circulating equitably. Be generous if you hold the scales, or accept charitable assistance gracefully if you need it.

6OfPentacles_reversed.title: Six of Pentacles
6OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Be careful of deceptive offers that come wrapped in heavy strings attached, or watch for unfair power dynamics in a contract.

7OfPentacles_upright.title: Seven of Pentacles
7OfPentacles_upright.meaning: Step back from your garden plots and observe your growth. Your long-term investments require patient waiting to fully mature.

7OfPentacles_reversed.title: Seven of Pentacles
7OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: You are feeling highly impatient and frustrated with slow growth. Re-evaluate if you are pouring energy into dead soil.

8OfPentacles_upright.title: Eight of Pentacles
8OfPentacles_upright.meaning: Put your head down and hone your skills. Meticulous focus, daily practice, and raw diligence are turning you into an absolute master.

8OfPentacles_reversed.title: Eight of Pentacles
8OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Toxic perfectionism is paralyzing your progress, or you are trapped in a dead-end, mind-numbing routine. Change your focus.

9OfPentacles_upright.title: Nine of Pentacles
9OfPentacles_upright.meaning: Enjoy the refined fruits of your independent labor. You have cultivated absolute financial autonomy, luxury, and peace.

9OfPentacles_reversed.title: Nine of Pentacles
9OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: You are projecting a fake lifestyle of luxury or living far beyond your realistic means. Re-ground your spending habits.

10OfPentacles_upright.title: Ten of Pentacles
10OfPentacles_upright.meaning: This marks generational wealth, enduring family security, and foundational legacy. You are safely anchored by a rich heritage.

10OfPentacles_reversed.title: Ten of Pentacles
10OfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Bitter arguments over inheritance, family real estate, or short-term speculative financial failures are threatening your peace.

pageOfPentacles_upright.title: Page of Pentacles
pageOfPentacles_upright.meaning: A grounded new study course, business concept, or clear ambition is taking shape. Plan the practical logistics carefully.

pageOfPentacles_reversed.title: Page of Pentacles
pageOfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Endless procrastination and a total lack of follow-through are stalling your career. Stop dreaming and start working.

knightOfPentacles_upright.title: Knight of Pentacles
knightOfPentacles_upright.meaning: The most reliable knight in the deck. Success is guaranteed through methodical routines, unyielding loyalty, and steady execution.

knightOfPentacles_reversed.title: Knight of Pentacles
knightOfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Your daily routine has become a mind-numbing prison of pure boredom. Break out of your rigid tracks and introduce spontaneity.

queenOfPentacles_upright.title: Queen of Pentacles
queenOfPentacles_upright.meaning: Balance home bliss with high business success. You are down-to-earth, practically secure, and deeply resourcefully grounded.

queenOfPentacles_reversed.title: Queen of Pentacles
queenOfPentacles_reversed.meaning: Your work-life balance is totally shattered. Fear of financial instability is forcing you into obsessive, smothering patterns.

kingOfPentacles_upright.title: King of Pentacles
kingOfPentacles_upright.meaning: You have reached the pinnacle of material success. Run your empire with supreme business acumen, calm authority, and stable leadership.

kingOfPentacles_reversed.title: King of Pentacles
kingOfPentacles_reversed.meaning: A rigid mindset or toxic obsession with status is blinding you. Do not let ruthless materialism corrupt your character.

aceOfSwords_upright.title: Ace of Swords
aceOfSwords_upright.meaning: A sudden wave of mental clarity brings a major breakthrough. The truth is sharp and clear, allowing you to cut through confusion and conquer obstacles.

2OfSwords_upright.title: Two of Swords
2OfSwords_upright.meaning: You are facing a difficult crossroad and trying to avoid making a choice. Remaining neutral or blocking out the facts will only prolong the stalemate.

3OfSwords_upright.title: Three of Swords
3OfSwords_upright.meaning: A sharp hurt, disappointment, or sudden loss brings emotional pain. Acknowledge your grief completely so that the natural healing process can begin.

4OfSwords_upright.title: Four of Swords
4OfSwords_upright.meaning: It is time to step back from stress and recharge your mental energy. Retreat into a quiet space to rest your mind and body before facing the world again.

5OfSwords_upright.title: Five of Swords
5OfSwords_upright.meaning: An argument or battle has left behind resentment and tension. Winning this conflict by playing dirty will yield a empty victory that damages your relationships.

6OfSwords_upright.title: Six of Swords
6OfSwords_upright.meaning: You are moving away from a turbulent situation toward calmer, more stable waters. It may be sad to leave things behind, but this transition is necessary.

aceOfSwords_reversed.title: Ace of Swords
aceOfSwords_reversed.meaning: Your thoughts are clouded by confusion or misinformation. Avoid making major choices right now, and be careful that your words do not cut others too deeply.

2OfSwords_reversed.title: Two of Swords
2OfSwords_reversed.meaning: The stalemate is breaking as new information comes to light. You can no longer avoid the decision; the time for choosing has arrived.

3OfSwords_reversed.title: Three of Swords
3OfSwords_reversed.meaning: You are beginning to heal from a painful heartbreak or loss. Alternatively, you may be stuffing your feelings down; let yourself feel the pain so you can clear it.

4OfSwords_reversed.title: Four of Swords
4OfSwords_reversed.meaning: You are pushing past your breaking point and risking total burnout. Stop ignoring your body's warnings, or you will be forced to rest due to exhaustion.

5OfSwords_reversed.title: Five of Swords
5OfSwords_reversed.meaning: The battle is finally ending, and you are ready to let go of old grudges. It is time to drop your defenses, bury the hatchet, and begin rebuilding trust.

6OfSwords_reversed.title: Six of Swords
6OfSwords_reversed.meaning: You are actively resisting a necessary life transition or dragging your past emotional baggage with you. The journey forward is rocky because you refuse to let go.
